faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about creating your business plan with Sqordia

items.question: How long does it take to create a business plan?
items.answer: Most users complete their business plan in under 60 minutes. Our AI-guided process streamlines the traditionally lengthy planning process.

items.question: Do I need financial expertise?
items.answer: No! Sqordia automatically generates 5-year financial projections, break-even analysis, and all required financial statements based on your inputs.

items.question: What export formats are available?
items.answer: You can export your business plan to PDF and Microsoft Word formats. Both are professionally formatted and bank-ready.

items.question: Can I update my plan after creation?
items.answer: Absolutely! Your plans are saved in your dashboard and can be edited anytime. Updates are reflected instantly.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes, we take security seriously. All data is encrypted and stored in Canadian data centers, compliant with Quebec Law 25 and PIPEDA.

items.question: Can I collaborate with my team?
items.answer: Yes! You can invite team members to view and edit your plans. Perfect for working with co-founders, advisors, or consultants.

items.question: What AI technology do you use?
items.answer: Sqordia uses advanced AI models trained specifically for business planning, ensuring accurate and relevant content generation.

items.question: Do you offer support for non-profits?
items.answer: Yes! We have specialized templates and questionnaires for OBNL (non-profit organizations) in Quebec and across Canada.
